title: Classification of Invariant Subalgebras in a class of factors with property (T)
abstract: Let $n\geq 2$ and $G_n=\mathbb{Z}^n\rtimes SL_n(\mathbb{Z})$. We classify all $G_n$-invariant von Neumann subalgebras in $L(G_n)$. For $n=2$, this gives an alternative proof of the previous result of Jiang-Liu. For $n\geq 3$, this gives the first class of property (T) groups without the invariant subalgebras rigidity property but invariant subalgebras in the corresponding group factors can still be classified. As a corollary, $L(G_n)$ admits a unique maximal Haagerup $G_n$-invariant von Neumann subalgebra.
